task: Implements the sprint's own explicit brief -- "not a redesign of the Companion Platform... purely about polishing the Story Egg experience" -- as a widget-feel pass entirely confined to js/companionEngine.js/js/companionDirector.js/css/style.css: the Companion Runtime's own architecture, the Companion Registry mechanism, and the Visitor/Creator lifecycle's pre-existing pose vocabulary are all completely unchanged, verified via a static diff of every pre-existing pose mapping and every one of the Runtime's 10 frozen public method names. Draggable physics: a small clamped rotation follows drag velocity via a CSS custom property (one write per pointermove, never a JS animation loop); a throttled sparkle trail; the glow ring brightens while dragging; on release a soft overshoot settle bounce plays; a genuine tap (never exceeding the existing drag-movement threshold) is now distinguished from a drag and never opens a menu or shows dialogue. Idle presence: a slow randomized ambient sparkle loop, a breathing glow ring (opacity+scale only, never an animated box-shadow), and a small decorative "home" environment layer (ground light, grass, two tiny flowers) behind the portrait. Hover brightens the glow ring, spawns occasional particles, and tilts toward the cursor. Click plays a happy wiggle plus a 3-particle sparkle burst. Pose transitions now briefly crossfade instead of an abrupt cut. Two new additive public methods, setRichness(level)/boostGlow(), let js/companionDirector.js derive a 0/1/2 emotional-richness level from AppState.slides.length and trigger a one-shot "first artwork" glow boost -- the engine only ever reacts to a plain numeric attribute, never told what it means. A new Studio event, "New Page -> excited", is added only to Visitor's own pose table (Creator/Lumo untouched) and wired through js/pageOps.js's real page-creation call sites. "Wanders home": after a real drag, a randomized 30-60s timer, gated by a 70% probability ("not every time"), glides the widget back to its default anchored position, measured via a real reflow rather than any hardcoded pixel value. A real, disclosed bug was found and fixed in the same pass: notify('creator-born') called loadRegistry() with no argument, silently missing the real ASSETS_BASE every other lookup in the file already uses. Verified via a new 55-assertion Playwright suite (frozen-API/pose-lifecycle/zero-id-branch/untouched-canonical-PNG static proofs; live drag/hover/click/crossfade/richness/wander-home coverage including a fully deterministic wander-home pass using a forced Math.random and Playwright's fake clock; a prefers-reduced-motion pass confirming zero particles spawn) plus the full existing 10-script Creator/Builder/Card-Platform regression suite and both goldenBuild.js suites -- all passing unchanged, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder change, no Companion Registry-mechanism/Package-Contract redesign, no Visitor/Creator lifecycle redesign.
